name: Dai Stablecoin — Troptions Gateway IOU
description: MakerDAO DAI issued as an on-ledger IOU from the Troptions Gateway. Each token represents one real DAI held in custody by the Troptions Gateway issuer. Redeemable 1:1 for DAI upon verified deal settlement. DAI is an AAVE v3 listed collateral asset — enables DeFi-native proof workflows and gateway fee settlement via the AAVE liquidity protocol. Issued on XRPL and Stellar mainnet.
aaveNotes: DAI is a native AAVE v3 collateral asset. Gateway may deposit DAI into AAVE v3 to generate aDAI yield while IOUs are outstanding, with aDAI as backing proof.

xrpl.xrplNote: DAI is a 3-character code — use standard XRPL currency encoding (not 20-byte hex).

compliance.custodianProof: Available upon verified deal settlement — AAVE aDAI position statement on request
